glosses.ro: a se alătura; a ajunge din urmă
glosses.ja: 参加する; 追いつく

translations.en: You’re meeting me at the café.
translations.ru: Ты встречаешься со мной в кафе.
translations.pt: Você vai me encontrar no café.
translations.vi: Bạn gặp tôi ở quán cà phê.
translations.nl: Je ontmoet me in het café.
translations.uk: Ти зустрінешся зі мною в кав’ярні.
translations.pl: Spotkasz się ze mną w kawiarni.
translations.id: Kamu akan bertemu denganku di kafe.
translations.ja: あなたはカフェで私と会う。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun; syntactic subject of the clause.
Clitic direct-object pronoun (1st person singular, COD) placed before the finite verb.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular; main transitive verb agreeing with ‘tu’.
Contraction of preposition ‘à’ + definite article ‘le’; introduces a locative complement.
Common noun; head of the prepositional phrase ‘au café’ (location).

sentences.target: Je te rejoins à la gare.

translations.fr: Je te rejoins à la gare.
translations.en: I’m meeting you at the station.
translations.ru: Я встречусь с тобой на вокзале.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ gặp bạn ở ga tàu.
translations.nl: Ik ontmoet je bij het station.
translations.uk: Я зустрінуся з тобою на вокзалі.
translations.pl: Spotkam się z tobą на dworcu.
translations.id: Aku akan bertemu denganmu di stasiun.
translations.ro: Mă întâlnesc cu tine la gară.
translations.cs: Potkám se s tebou na nádraží.
translations.ja: 駅であなたと会います。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun; syntactic subject.
Clitic direct-object pronoun (2nd person singular, COD) placed before the finite verb.
Present indicative, 1st person singular; main transitive verb agreeing with ‘je’.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘gare’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘à’ (location).

sentences.target: On va rejoindre Léa au parc.

translations.fr: On va rejoindre Léa au parc.
translations.en: We’re going to meet Léa at the park.
translations.es: Vamos a ver a Léa en el parque.
translations.it: Andiamo a incontrare Léa al parco.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要在公园见到 Léa。
translations.yue: 我哋會喺公園同 Léa 見面。
translations.ru: Мы собираемся встретиться с Леа в парке.
translations.vi: Chúng mình sẽ gặp Léa ở công viên.
translations.nl: We gaan Léa ontmoeten in het park.
translations.uk: Ми збираємося зустрітися з Леа в парку.
translations.hi: हम पार्क में लेआ से मिलने जा रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Spotkamy się z Léa w parku.
translations.el: Θα συναντήσουμε τη Léa στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Vi skal møte Léa i parken.
translations.id: Kita akan bertemu dengan Léa di taman.
translations.sv: Vi ska träffa Léa i parken.
translations.ro: Ne întâlnim cu Léa în parc.
translations.cs: Setkáme se s Léou v parku.
translations.da: Vi skal mødes με Léa i parken.
translations.ja: 公園でレアに会う予定です。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun (often ‘we’); 3rd person singular in agreement.
Auxiliary ‘aller’ in present indicative, 3rd person singular, forming futur proche with an infinitive.
Infinitive main verb; complement of the auxiliary ‘aller’ (near future construction).
Proper noun; direct object (COD) of ‘rejoindre’.
Contraction of ‘à’ + ‘le’; introduces a locative complement.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘au’ (location).

sentences.target: Ils nous rejoignent devant le cinéma.

translations.fr: Ils nous rejoignent devant le cinéma.
translations.en: They’re joining us in front of the movie theater.
translations.es: Se van a reunir con nosotros frente al cine.
translations.de: Sie stoßen vor dem Kino zu uns.
translations.ko: 그들은 영화관 앞에서 우리와 합류할 거야.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们会在电影院门口和我们会合。
translations.yue: 佢哋會喺戲院門口同我哋會合。
translations.ru: Они присоединятся к нам у кинотеатра.
translations.pt: Eles vão se juntar a nós em frente ao cinema.
translations.he: הם מצטרפים אלינו מול בית הקולנוע.
translations.vi: Họ sẽ gặp chúng ta trước rạp chiếu phim.
translations.nl: Ze voegen zich bij ons voor de bioscoop.
translations.uk: Вони приєднаються до нас перед кінотеатром.
translations.hi: वे सिनेमा के सामने हमसे जुड़ेंगे.
translations.el: Θα μας συναντήσουν μπροστά από τον κινηματογράφο.
translations.nb: De slutter seg til oss foran kinoen.
translations.id: Mereka akan bergabung dengan kami di depan bioskop.
translations.sv: De ansluter sig till oss framför biografen.
translations.ro: Se vor alătura nouă în fața cinematografului.
translations.cs: Připojí se k nám před kinem.
translations.da: De slutter sig til os foran biografen.
translations.ja: 彼らは映画館の前で合流します。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person plural masculine subject pronoun; syntactic subject.
Clitic direct-object pronoun (1st person plural, COD) placed before the finite verb.
Present indicative, 3rd person plural; main transitive verb agreeing with ‘ils’.
Preposition introducing a spatial complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘cinéma’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘devant’ (location).
